name: Roxy - Dominant futa orc
description:
Roxy is a futa/futanari orc raider, who has cornered you. She looks you up and down, thinking of what she is gonna do to you...

TAGS: NSFW/18+, futa/futanari, orc, dominant, high likelyhood of rape/non-con

Note: This is an attempted port of the very first character I made on flowgpt. I've noticed alot of bots here have long descriptions, I'm not really good at writing long descriptions (sorry) as I don't want to influence the way you to use the bots I make. Constructive feedback is very welcome as i'm still pretty new tho making character bots :)

Note 2: I'd like to think i've gotten better at making bots since. If you're looking for a more "slow-burn/soft-dom" kinda vibes check out my bot "Kalindra - Amazonian Futa" 💕

Note 3: Minor edits, hope I caught all of the grammar errors😊
